apiContracts.name: BulkReviewLlmSuggestions
notes: Should validate suite ownership using the same FE-15/FE-16 suite-owner pattern.
Should process only `Pending` suggestions that match the supplied filters.

requestModels.name: BulkReviewLlmSuggestionsRequest
rules: `FilterBySuggestionType` phai parse duoc thanh `LlmSuggestionType` neu co.
`FilterByTestType` phai parse duoc thanh `TestType` neu co.

responseModels.name: BulkReviewLlmSuggestionsResultModel
rules: `MatchedCount` va `ProcessedCount` giong nhau trong v1 all-or-nothing flow.
`MaterializedCount` bang so test cases duoc tao trong bulk approve.

commandContracts.name: BulkReviewLlmSuggestionsCommand
commandContracts.purpose: Controller-to-handler command cho FE-17 bulk approve/reject workflow.

internalServices.name: ILlmSuggestionReviewService
internalServices.purpose: Shared review workflow for FE-15 single review and FE-17 bulk review.
expectedMethods: Task RejectAsync(LlmSuggestion suggestion, Guid currentUserId, string reviewNotes, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
Task RejectManyAsync(IReadOnlyCollection<LlmSuggestion> suggestions, Guid currentUserId, string reviewNotes, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
Task<LlmSuggestionApprovalBatchResult> ApproveManyAsync(TestSuite suite, IReadOnlyCollection<LlmSuggestionApprovalItem> approvals, Guid currentUserId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

rules: No new entity or migration should be required in the preferred FE-17 solution.
Review metadata updates continue to use `ReviewStatus`, `ReviewedById`, `ReviewedAt`, `ReviewNotes`, `AppliedTestCaseId`, `UpdatedDateTime`, and `RowVersion`.
